title: T-028 — POST /api/production/work-orders/:id/outputs (primary output registration)
prompt:
# T-028 — POST /work-orders/:id/outputs (primary)

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.3 FR-08-E3-001, §8.2.3, §16.4 V-PROD-04/24

## Goal
Implement POST /outputs endpoint for primary output registration: LP creation via 05-WH, batch_number auto-gen (pattern WO_CODE-OUT-NNN), expiry = today + item.shelf_life_days, write wo_outputs row.

## Implementation contract
App Router POST /api/production/work-orders/[id]/outputs. Zod body {transaction_id: uuid, operator_id: uuid, output_type: 'primary'|'co_product'|'by_product', qty_kg: number(>0), batch_number_auto?: boolean, catch_weight_kg_per_unit?: number, putaway_location_id?: uuid}. withIdempotency. Atomic transaction: load WO + item, generate batch_number (WO_CODE-OUT-{seq}; seq computed via SELECT count+1 of wo_outputs WHERE wo_id and output_type), compute expiry_date = current_date + item.shelf_life_days (V-PROD-04), call 05-WH lp-create adapter, INSERT wo_outputs row. Return 200 {output_id, lp_id, batch_number, label_pdf_url} (label_pdf_url stub deferred to T-033).

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/outputs/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/outputs/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/register-output.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given valid WO + item shelf_life=30, when POST /outputs with primary qty=100kg, then 200 with batch_number matching WO_CODE-OUT-001 and expiry_date = today + 30d (V-PROD-04)
2. Given two sequential primary outputs same WO, when POSTed, then batch_numbers WO_CODE-OUT-001 and WO_CODE-OUT-002 (incremented seq)
3. Given qty_kg=0, when POST, then 422 ValidationError listing qty_kg (V-PROD-03)

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting batch_number pattern + expiry date + 422 before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test work-orders.*outputs'

## Risk red lines
- Do not generate batch_number outside the WO_CODE-OUT-NNN pattern
- Do not skip expiry_date computation (V-PROD-04)
- Do not split LP creation + wo_outputs insert across two transactions

pipeline_inputs.description: POST /outputs primary output: 05-WH LP creation + auto batch_number + expiry from shelf_life.
pipeline_inputs.details: Atomic: increment seq via wo_outputs count, generate batch_number, call lp-create, INSERT wo_outputs. expiry_date = current_date + item.shelf_life_days (V-PROD-04). label_pdf_url stub returned (real PDF in T-033).
out_of_scope: Do not implement output yield gate (T-035)
acceptance_criteria: Given item shelf_life=30, when POST primary qty=100, then batch_number=WO_CODE-OUT-001 and expiry=today+30d
Given two sequential primary outputs, when POSTed, then batches WO_CODE-OUT-001 and WO_CODE-OUT-002
Given qty_kg=0, when POST, then 422 listing qty_kg (V-PROD-03)
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting batch + expiry + 422 before route exists
risk_red_lines: Do not deviate from WO_CODE-OUT-NNN pattern
Do not split LP+wo_outputs across transactions
